title: The insider trading suspicions looming over Trump's presidency
summary: Throughout US President Donald Trump's second term in office, traders have been betting millions of dollars just before he makes major announcements. meta.twitter:title: The insider trading suspicions looming over Trump's presidency
meta.og:description: The BBC has found a pattern of spikes in trades ahead of public announcements by the US president.

meta.og:image:alt: Man looking at trading app on his smart phone from his home office. He is being photographed from behind, so only his hands on his phone are visible in hard focus with the back of his shoulders and his office screens visible in soft focus.
